title: Lucy Enters the Corrida Colosseum
description: Pages 1–4 focus on lucy enters the corrida colosseum, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo Family, Luffy, Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as luffy enters the waiting room, meets dangerous competitors, and the tournament begins to reveal how many powers are converging on Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So it seems like two copies of the same devil fruit

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But why`s the Mera Mera No'MI here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can never exist at the same time

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They say that when an ability user dies

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The fruit with his former power is reborn somewhere in this world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "Firefist" Ace's fruit was reincarnated after his death.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And, without anyone knowing, young master was able to obtain the Mera Mera no mi ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: When it came to putting up a Logia fruit as a prize for this event...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Even young master was hesitant ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Getting one's hands on something like that... My life would be changed forever.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ehh!? You think I'd ever let you eat it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah, that's right. Ace was your ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I want it!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That Mera Mera No mi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm would you eat it, frankly!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'd rather be able to swim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I CAN'T EAT IT, BECAUSE I'VE ALREADY GOT THE GOMU GOMU, BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't like the idea of someone else in the world walking around with ace's power!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This... My "Mera Mera" ability ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...so it's like a memento.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What Dofla- Mingo said is enough for us to assume that this is a trap, but ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll say this much-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: As long as we've got this chance. Let's take it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Living life with regrets is no fun

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: And we've got business at the colosseum any- way, so let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: YEAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those idiots ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No one would be putting their lives on the line if just wanting it were enough

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Don't underestimate the level of play in the colosseum ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Chasing after the mysterious "fairy"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HAA HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fairy, my ass !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Just a common thief!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where'd it disappear to?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I said wait up!!! Who cares about a sword or two!! Just give up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As if, you moron!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What!! That's ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Did you see the fairy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Strum ching black

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stomp Stomp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ching Ching

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on lucy enters the corrida colosseum, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
